race.description: Ladies Of David J Smith Racing Hcp (C2)
race.comment: CURRUMBIN ALLEY (3) has returned in solid order this prep but is starting to prove frustrating for punters, going under as favourite in his last two. Peak fitness now, so giving another chance. UNREAL EXPECTATION (2) never stopped trying first-up in stronger company at Bathurst when chasing down a minor placing. Goes up in the weights but strips fitter and loves this trip. Not taking lightly. PROCLIVITY (7) was a barnstorming CL1 winner last start at Tamworth over this trip. Draws to take much closer order this time and can keep the ball rolling. THE CONTRACTOR (5) showed good early dash last start but was no match for an impressive winner at Bathurst. Strips rock-hard fit and draws to be in this for a long way. Shed his maiden tag here in dominant fashion earlier in the prep. Is certainly one to consider.
